standard: Never invent evidence; every durable fact is written via `record apply`, never hand-edited.
why: auditability + recovery depend on the state being the single source of truth

standard: Gate results before they back a claim: baseline_gate passed/waived, result validity=valid, no unresolved contradiction.
why: supported claims must trace to validated evidence

standard: Take the smallest valid step; one bounded turn per wake; do not widen the frontier without a decision.
why: bounded steps keep the loop recoverable and reviewable

standard: Touch state only through `$HARNESS`; reply upstream to the Orchestrator; keep loop-internal wording out of manuscripts.
why: preserves the tree-loop contract and clean publication output

standard: Park/abandon branches, never delete their commits; record why.
why: negative results and dead ends are reusable assets
